info.title: SqlManagementClient
info.description: The Azure SQL Database management API provides a RESTful set of web APIs that interact with Azure SQL Database services to manage your databases. The API enables users to create, retrieve, update, and delete databases, servers, and other entities.

get.description: Lists the long term retention backups for a given location.

parameters.name: onlyLatestPerDatabase
parameters.description: Whether or not to only get the latest backup for each database.

parameters.name: databaseState
parameters.description: Whether to query against just live databases, just deleted databases, or all databases.

get.description: Lists the long term retention backups for a given server.

parameters.name: onlyLatestPerDatabase
parameters.description: Whether or not to only get the latest backup for each database.

parameters.name: databaseState
parameters.description: Whether to query against just live databases, just deleted databases, or all databases.

get.description: Lists all long term retention backups for a database.

parameters.name: onlyLatestPerDatabase
parameters.description: Whether or not to only get the latest backup for each database.

parameters.description: Whether to query against just live databases, just deleted databases, or all databases.

get.description: Gets a long term retention backup.

delete.description: Deletes a long term retention backup.

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

parameters.description: Whether or not to only get the latest backup for each database.

parameters.description: Whether to query against just live databases, just deleted databases, or all databases.

parameters.description: Whether or not to only get the latest backup for each database.

parameters.description: Whether to query against just live databases, just deleted databases, or all databases.

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

ChangeLongTermRetentionBackupAccessTierP.description: Contains the information necessary to change long term retention backup access tier and related operation mode.

backupStorageAccessTier.description: The long term retention backup storage access tier

operationMode.description: The operation mode when updating ltr backup storage access tier

CopyLongTermRetentionBackupParameters.description: Contains the information necessary to perform long term retention backup copy operation.

CopyLongTermRetentionBackupParametersPro.description: Contains the properties to perform long term retention backup copy operation.

targetSubscriptionId.description: The subscription that owns the target server

targetResourceGroup.description: The resource group that owns the target server

targetServerResourceId.description: The resource Id of the target server that owns the database

targetServerFullyQualifiedDomainName.description: The fully qualified domain name of the target server

targetDatabaseName.description: The name of the database owns the copied backup.

targetBackupStorageRedundancy.description: The storage redundancy type of the copied backup

LongTermRetentionBackupListResult.description: A list of long term retention backups.

nextLink.description: Link to retrieve next page of results.

LongTermRetentionBackupProperties.description: Properties of a long term retention backup

serverName.description: The server name that the backup database belong to.

serverCreateTime.description: The create time of the server.

databaseName.description: The name of the database the backup belong to

databaseDeletionTime.description: The delete time of the database

backupTime.description: The time the backup was taken

backupExpirationTime.description: The time the long term retention backup will expire.

backupStorageRedundancy.description: The storage redundancy type of the backup

requestedBackupStorageRedundancy.description: The storage redundancy type of the backup

isBackupImmutable.description: The setting whether the LTR backup is immutable

timeBasedImmutability.description: The setting for whether or not time-based immutability is enabled for the LTR backup. When time-based immutability is enabled and locked, the backup cannot be deleted until BackupExpirationTime.

timeBasedImmutabilityMode.description: The time-based immutability mode. Only applicable if time-based immutability is enabled.

legalHoldImmutability.description: The setting for whether LegalHold is enabled or disabled on the LTR backup. When LegalHold is enabled, the backup cannot be deleted until the LegalHold is removed.

backupStorageAccessTier.description: The BackupStorageAccessTier for the LTR backup

LongTermRetentionOperationResultProperti.description: Contains the operation result properties for long term retention backup operation.

targetBackupStorageRedundancy.description: The storage redundancy type of the copied backup

UpdateLongTermRetentionBackupParameters.description: Contains the information necessary to perform long term retention backup update operation.

UpdateLongTermRetentionBackupParametersP.description: Contains the properties to perform long term retention backup copy operation.

requestedBackupStorageRedundancy.description: The storage redundancy type of the copied backup
